name: Butler Wheelchair Transport
registry_source: FL Sunbiz (Doc# P19000021725) — principal address 1990 Main Street, Sarasota, FL 34236; RA Angela Butler, 2252 Lockwood Meadows Dr, Sarasota
notes: No USDOT/MC located in SAFER for Butler Wheelchair Transport (likely intrastate FL NEMT/wheelchair van operator, exempt from federal registration). FL Sunbiz lists principal in Sarasota rather than the Tallevast PO Box address; service area is Sarasota-Bradenton-Tallevast. Operates branded as 'Butler Wheelchair Transport, Inc.' (butler6.com).

name: Faletti Enterprises Inc
inc_date: 2014 (per third-party listings; IL SOS exact filing date not pulled)
registry_source: IL Secretary of State business entity search (apps.ilsos.gov); QuickTransportSolutions; D&B
notes: FMCSA record confirms Faletti Enterprises Inc is a freight/property carrier (metal sheet, machinery, liquids/gases) — NOT a school bus operator. The Dwight, IL address matches. Insurance via Artisan & Truckers Casualty. Likely NOT a student-transportation tuck-in target; reclassify as a general freight company. No passenger/school-bus authority indicated.

name: Kinzy Limousine
entity_status: unknown (no clear CA SOS entity match located; possible sole-prop or fictitious business name)
registry_source: CA SOS bizfile search attempted (bizfileonline.sos.ca.gov); Yelp lists business in South San Francisco; alternate San Mateo address (400 E Hillsdale Blvd Ste 302) also surfaced
notes: No USDOT (likely intrastate). The only SAFER match for 'Kinzy' (KINZY ENTERPRISES LLC, USDOT 3347671) is a Houston, TX freight carrier — NOT this Bay Area limousine business. Kinzy Limousine appears to operate as a charter/limo service in the SF Peninsula (Belmont/San Mateo/SSF area); would be CA PUC/TCP regulated rather than FMCSA. Not clearly a school-bus operator.

name: Castle Car Svc

entity_status: Active per company website / MI LARA (officers not publicly extracted)
registry_source: MI LARA Corporations Division (cofs.lara.state.mi.us); company website castlecarservices.com
notes: No USDOT (likely intrastate). The active 'Castle Car Services, Inc.' is headquartered at 4155 Holt Rd, Holt, MI 48842 (not Bath, MI 48808 as listed) — operates Non-Emergency Medical Transportation across Mid-Michigan (Ingham, Livingston, Eaton, etc.) since 2002. The 5785 Somerset Dr, Bath, MI address in source data may be an old/secondary/residential filing address. Not a school-bus operator; NEMT-focused. Service rate ~$2.55/mile.
